# Nathan Anderson — Chief Technology Officer & Technology Leadership Blog

## What This Site Is

nathananderson.com is the professional portfolio and blog of Nathan Anderson, a Chief Technology Officer with 25+ years of technology leadership experience. The site serves two purposes:

1. **Portfolio**: A showcase of Nathan's career, expertise, and credentials as a technology executive available for fractional CTO engagements and full-time leadership roles.
2. **Blog**: Practical insights on technology leadership, engineering management, scaling teams, and digital transformation — drawn from real experience leading engineering organizations at companies like Rackspace, ClearDATA, Chargify (now Maxio), CyberFortress, and SWIVEL.

## Who Nathan Anderson Is

Nathan Anderson is a seasoned Chief Technology Officer currently serving as CTO and Co-Founder at Tú TeleDoc (2025–present), a healthcare technology company. He previously operated a fractional CTO consulting practice (April 2024–May 2025) serving early and mid-stage startups.

His career spans 25+ years across multiple industries:
- **FinTech**: Chargify/Maxio (billing and subscription management), SWIVEL (payments)
- **Healthcare Tech**: ClearDATA (HIPAA-compliant cloud), Tú TeleDoc (telemedicine)
- **Cybersecurity**: CyberFortress (backup and data protection)
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Rackspace (one of the pioneers of managed cloud hosting)

## Who This Site Is For

- **Startup founders and executives** seeking experienced technology leadership without a full-time CTO hire
- **Engineering leaders and CTOs** looking for practical guidance on team building, scaling, and organizational design
- **Companies in regulated industries** (healthcare, fintech) needing expertise in SOC 2, PCI DSS, HIPAA, and GDPR compliance
- **Technology professionals** interested in career growth, mentorship, and engineering management best practices
- **Event organizers and podcast hosts** looking for an experienced technology executive speaker or guest

## Core Expertise

- **Technology Strategy & Vision**: Building roadmaps that align engineering investment with business goals
- **Engineering Leadership**: Scaling engineering teams from startup to enterprise (10 to 50+ engineers)
- **Cloud Architecture**: AWS, Azure, and GCP solutions at scale
- **Compliance & Security**: SOC 2, PCI DSS, HIPAA, GDPR across FinTech and Healthcare
- **Digital Transformation**: Modernizing legacy systems and transitioning to cloud-native architectures
- **Team Building & Mentoring**: Hiring, developing, and retaining high-performing engineering talent
- **M&A Due Diligence**: Technical evaluation and post-merger engineering integration

## Problems Nathan Helps Solve

- Engineering organizations that have outgrown their current leadership structure
- Startups that need CTO-level strategic guidance without a full-time executive hire
- Companies stuck in technical debt that's slowing product delivery
- Engineering teams that lack a DevOps culture and CI/CD foundation
- Organizations entering regulated industries for the first time (healthcare, fintech)
- Companies preparing for M&A, investor due diligence, or compliance audits

## Blog Content Topics

The blog covers:
- Technology leadership and CTO strategy
- Engineering management and team building
- Fractional CTO services and what they provide
- San Antonio and Texas tech community events
- Industry conferences and professional development
- Personal reflections on technology and leadership careers

## Contact & Social

- **Email**: nathan@nathananderson.com
- **Location**: San Antonio, TX
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/nathanedwardanderson
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/nanderson
- **Current Company**: Tú TeleDoc (https://tuteledoc.com)

## Technical Details

- Built with Hugo (static site generator) and the hugo-profile theme
- Hosted as a static site
- RSS and ATOM feeds available at /index.xml
- Blog posts available at /blog
- Sitemap at /sitemap.xml
